# ABG Wholesale Digital Dashboard

> Multi-brand analytics hub for American Bath Group, aggregating Google Analytics, Search Console, HubSpot CRM, email marketing, and social media performance across 45+ wholesale bath, shower, and spa brands.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Main performance dashboard with brand switcher, date range, GA4/GSC analytics, social media, HubSpot emails, and CRM tabs.
- [Login](/login): Authenticated access for American Bath Group team members.
- [CRM Proposal](/crm-proposal): HubSpot CRM proposal and comparison overview.

## Optional

- [Admin](/admin): Internal admin panel (restricted access).
